# Client Intake Questions

> Complete questionnaire for onboarding new GBP optimization clients.

---

## How to Use This Document

1. **Before the call:** Send a brief pre-qualification form
2. **During onboarding:** Use the full intake form (digital or this questionnaire)
3. **After signing:** Collect remaining information via follow-up

**Digital Intake:** `/admin/gbp/intake`

---

## Section 1: Business Basics

### Essential Information
| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Legal business name (as registered) | |
| DBA / Display name (if different) | |
| Business phone number | |
| Business email | |
| Website URL | |
| Year established | |

| ZIP code | |

| ZIP codes served | |
| Radius from location (miles) | |
| Maximum travel distance | |

## Quick Reference Checklist

### Before Starting Work
- [ ] Signed contract received
- [ ] Payment method set up
- [ ] GBP access granted
- [ ] Basic info collected (NAP, hours, categories)
- [ ] Target keywords identified
- [ ] Logo and photos received
- [ ] Point of contact established

### Before First Report
- [ ] Profile fully optimized
- [ ] Citations submitted
- [ ] First posts published
- [ ] Review strategy discussed
- [ ] Baseline metrics recorded
- [ ] Keyword tracking active
